title: Number 10th Birthday Balloon Lime Green Pixel, 40 Inch Large Dark Kelly Green Number 10 Foil Balloons for Boys 10 Year Old Birthday Video Game Forest Golf Patrick's Day Party Decorations Supplies
features: Lime Green 10th Birthday Balloon: This product includes 1pc 40" Apple Green Foil Number 10 Balloon, pixel style design, with 1 inflatable straw for easy inflation. Carefully packaged, quick to set up - whether you are decorating for a home party or a large event.

Scenario of Use: This light green 10th balloon is not only limited to 10 year old boys birthday and 10th anniversariy, but is also suitable for him and her various game theme party, dinosaur theme party, football, golf party or any creative celebration photography scenes, etc. It is versatile and practical.

Quality & Safety: This bright green 10th birthday decorations for boys are made of thickened environmentally friendly aluminum film material, with good sealing, explosion-proof and leak-proof, easy to deflate and store for future parties—inflate again when needed. Eco-friendly and cost-saving!

Simple Installation: This 40 inch 10 balloon numbers for children have self-sealing valve does not need to be knotted for easy inflation and deflation. It can be inflated with air or helium. If helium is used, it can be suspended in the air, which is more dazzling and three-dimensional. It can be reused.

Commitment: We’re committed to providing quality party supplies service. If you encounter any issues with the number balloon inflation or quality, please contact us through Amazon messages and we will reply within 24 hours. Your satisfaction is our top priority.
description: Wide Range of Use Occasions 🎈 Ideal for 10th birthday celebrations, whether for boys or girls, at home, school, or party venues. 🎈 Great for sports-themed parties like football, soccer, or golf — the vibrant green adds team spirit and energy. 🎈 Perfect for jungle or outdoor adventure themes, pairing well with leaves, animal props, or earthy tones. 🎈 A fun fit for video game–themed parties or digital-style decorations, especially with a pixel-style look. 🎈 Can be used in holiday celebrations like St. Patrick’s Day, where green is a festive must-have color. 🎈 Great as a photo prop or backdrop piece for seasonal events, family gatherings, or themed corporate functions. Product Size & Specifications 📏 Size: 40 inch 📏 Color: Lime green / dark green / hunter green / metallic green / apple green / neon green 📏 Material: Durable aluminum foil, odorless, reusable 📏 Fillable with air or helium 📏 Includes: 1 × number 1 balloon + 1 × number 0 balloon + 1 × plastic straw for inflation and deflation Instructions and Important Tips 📢 Do not over-inflate to avoid damage. 📢 Use tape or glue dots to secure to wall, arch or backdrop when inflated for display. 📢 Store in a cool, dry place. Keep away from open flames, sharp objects and direct sunlight. 📢 Not a toy. Adult supervision recommended when inflating and decorating. 📢 Due to light and screen differences, the color of this product may be slightly different from the picture. 📢 Due to manual measurement, there may be some errors in size and weight.
